BIG_DECK.bronzeDescription: Won with a deck of 40 or more cards.
BIG_DECK.goldDescription: Won with a deck of 100 or more cards.
BIG_DECK.silverDescription: Won with a deck of 60 or more cards.
CCCCOMBO.description: Played 20 cards in a single turn.
CCCCOMBO.title: C-c-c-Combo
CURSES.title: Curses!
DAMAGE_LEADER.description: Dealt the most damage to enemies in multiplayer.
DAMAGE_LEADER.title: Damage Leader
DEBUFFER.description: Applied the most Debuffs in multiplayer.
DEBUFFER.title: Debuffer
DOUBLE_SNECKO.description: Obtained both fake and real Snecko eyes.
DOUBLE_SNECKO.title: Double Snecko
FAMISHED.description: Won with Max HP reduced to less than half of your starting HP.
FAMISHED.title: Famished
FAVORITE_CARD.description: Won a run and played a single card more than 100 times.
FAVORITE_CARD.title: Favorite Card
GLUTTON.bronzeDescription: Won a run with your Max HP increased by 15 or more.
GLUTTON.goldDescription: Won a run with absurdly high Max HP (increased by 50 or more).
GLUTTON.silverDescription: Won a run with your Max HP increased by 30 or more.
HEALER.goldDescription: Mended allies over and over again (at least 3 times).
HIGHLANDER.description: Won with a deck where no two cards are the same (excludes Starters).
HIGHLANDER.title: Highlander
HONED.description: Won with a deck with 5 or more of the same card (excludes Starters).
HONED.title: Honed
ILIKESHINY.title: I Like Shiny
KACHING.description: Spent more than 1,000 Gold at the Merchant.
KACHING.title: Ka-Ching!
MYSTERY_MACHINE.title: Mystery Machine
PERFECT.bronzeDescription: Defeated a boss without losing HP.
RESTFUL.description: Won a run while resting at each Rest Site.
RESTFUL.title: Restful
RESTLESS.description: Won a run without ever resting.
RESTLESS.title: Restless
SPEEDY.bronzeDescription: Won a run in under 50 minutes.
SPEEDY.goldDescription: Won a run in under 30 minutes.
SPEEDY.silverDescription: Won a run in under 40 minutes.
TABLET.title: Tablet of Truth
TEAM_PLAYER.description: Deck contained 3 or more multiplayer-only cards.
TEAM_PLAYER.title: Team Player
TINY_DECK.bronzeDescription: Won with a deck of 20 or fewer cards.
TINY_DECK.goldDescription: Won with a deck of 5 or fewer cards.
TINY_DECK.silverDescription: Won with a deck of 10 or fewer cards.
WHOMPER.description: Dealt more than 100 damage with a single attack.
WHOMPER.title: Whomper
